COMPANY POLICY DOCUMENT — SAMPLE
Version 1.0 | January 2025

REFUND POLICY
Customers may request a refund within 30 days of purchase. Refunds are processed within
5-7 business days of the approved request. Digital products are non-refundable once
downloaded. To initiate a refund, contact support@example.com with your order number.

PASSWORD RESET
To reset your password, navigate to the login page and click the "Forgot password" link.
Enter your registered email address. A password reset link will be sent within 5 minutes.
The link expires after 24 hours. If you do not receive the email, check your spam folder
or contact support.

DATA RETENTION
Per our compliance requirements, all customer data is retained for a minimum of 7 years
from the date of last activity. After this period, data is securely deleted using
industry-standard data destruction methods. Users may request early deletion of their
personal data by submitting a data deletion request form.

PAYMENT METHODS
We accept the following payment methods: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and PayPal.
All transactions are processed securely via our PCI-DSS compliant payment gateway.
We do not store card numbers on our servers. Bank transfers are available for orders
over $10,000.

CUSTOMER SUPPORT
Our support team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year.
You can reach us via:
- Live chat: Available on our website homepage
- Email: support@example.com
- Phone: 1-800-EXAMPLE (Mon-Fri, 9am-6pm EST)
Average response time for email is under 4 hours.
